name: collector skips Activity collection when activity dimension opt-in is not set in space/config.yaml
command:
mkdir -p space && printf 'dimensions:
  activity: {opt_in: true, enabled: false}
share: never
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric activity-commits --config space/config.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'activity_skipped=opt_in_not_set' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
